summary: Tested new advanced filter features for WhatsApp tab. All filter UI elements present and working correctly: Categorie dropdown, Plaats dropdown, Status dropdown, 'Zonder website' toggle, 'Met telefoon' toggle. Search input searches on naam, plaats AND categorie. Bulk WhatsApp bar shows filtered count with 'leads in selectie klaar om te benaderen' text. All previous functionality (tabs, IMPORTEREN/OPSLAAN/EXPORT/WISSEN) still working.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor hydration warning from React dev tools, does not affect functionality (same as iteration 43)

passed_tests: FRONTEND: Categorie dropdown filter exists with data-testid='csv-categorie-filter'
FRONTEND: Categorie dropdown shows 'Alle Categorieën' as default + auto-populated options (Kapper)
FRONTEND: Categorie filter correctly filters leads (selecting 'Kapper' shows only Kapper leads)
FRONTEND: Plaats dropdown filter exists with data-testid='csv-plaats-filter'
FRONTEND: Plaats dropdown shows 'Alle Plaatsen' as default + auto-populated options (Amsterdam)
FRONTEND: Plaats filter correctly filters leads (selecting 'Amsterdam' shows only Amsterdam leads)
FRONTEND: Status dropdown filter exists with data-testid='csv-status-filter'
FRONTEND: Status dropdown shows 'Alle Status' as default + options (Nieuw, Benaderd, Gereageerd, Geen interesse, Overgeslagen)
FRONTEND: 'Zonder website' toggle button exists with data-testid='csv-no-website-toggle'
FRONTEND: 'Met telefoon' toggle button exists with data-testid='csv-met-telefoon-toggle'
FRONTEND: 'Met telefoon' toggle turns green (#25D366) when active
FRONTEND: Search input exists with data-testid='csv-search-input'
FRONTEND: Search input placeholder says 'Zoek op naam, plaats of categorie...'
FRONTEND: Search on categorie works (searching 'Kapper' finds matching leads)
FRONTEND: Search on plaats works (searching 'Amsterdam' finds matching leads)
FRONTEND: Multi-filter combination works (Categorie + Status filters together)
FRONTEND: Bulk WhatsApp bar shows filtered count instead of total count
FRONTEND: Bulk WhatsApp bar text says 'leads in selectie klaar om te benaderen'
FRONTEND: Bulk WhatsApp bar shows 'Stuurt alleen naar gefilterde resultaten' when filters active
FRONTEND: WhatsApp limit tracker visible and working
FRONTEND: HOME tab works correctly
FRONTEND: WHATSAPP tab works correctly
FRONTEND: EMAIL tab works correctly
FRONTEND: STATS tab works correctly
FRONTEND: IMPORTEREN button visible on WHATSAPP tab
FRONTEND: OPSLAAN button visible on WHATSAPP tab
FRONTEND: EXPORT button visible on WHATSAPP tab
FRONTEND: WISSEN button visible on WHATSAPP tab
critical_code_review_comments: Filter implementation is clean and follows React best practices
uniqueCategorieen and uniquePlaatsen are correctly computed from csvLeads using Set for deduplication
filteredCsvLeads logic correctly applies all filters (csvOnlyNoWebsite, csvOnlyMetTelefoon, csvStatusFilter, csvCategorieFilter, csvPlaatsFilter, csvSearchQuery)
Search correctly searches on naam, plaats, AND categorie fields
Bulk WhatsApp correctly uses filteredCsvLeads instead of all csvLeads
seed_data_creation: Existing test data: 4 leads (Salon Beauty, Nieuw Bedrijf, TEST_Legacy_1775593535, Test Kapper Email). 'Test Kapper Email' has categorie='Kapper' and plaats='Amsterdam'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44: Tested advanced filter features for WhatsApp tab. All filters working: Categorie dropdown (auto-populated from leads), Plaats dropdown (auto-populated), Status dropdown, 'Zonder website' toggle, 'Met telefoon' toggle. Search searches on naam, plaats, categorie. Bulk WhatsApp uses filteredCsvLeads. Key data-testids: csv-categorie-filter, csv-plaats-filter, csv-status-filter, csv-no-website-toggle, csv-met-telefoon-toggle, csv-search-input, bulk-whatsapp-bar. Password: yrvante2025.

categorie_dropdown_filter.details: Shows 'Alle Categorieën' default + auto-populated options from leads

plaats_dropdown_filter.details: Shows 'Alle Plaatsen' default + auto-populated options from leads

zonder_website_toggle.details: Toggle button filters leads without website

met_telefoon_toggle.details: Toggle button filters leads with phone, turns green when active

search_on_naam_plaats_categorie.details: Search input searches on naam, plaats AND categorie fields

multi_filter_combination.details: Multiple filters can be combined (e.g., category + status)

bulk_whatsapp_filtered_count.details: Shows filtered count with 'leads in selectie klaar om te benaderen' text

whatsapp_limit_tracker.details: Still visible and working on WHATSAPP tab

all_tabs_working.details: HOME, WHATSAPP, EMAIL, STATS tabs all work correctly

whatsapp_tab_buttons.details: IMPORTEREN, OPSLAAN, EXPORT, WISSEN buttons visible and functional
